article_title: 别再用 DateTime.Now：用 TimeProvider 让 .NET 代码可测试
core_theme: DateTime.Now 是 .NET 代码中的隐式全局状态，应该改用 TimeProvider 依赖注入，让时间相关逻辑可测试
reader_takeaway: 了解为什么 DateTime.Now 让测试变难，以及如何用 TimeProvider 或 IDateTimeProvider 接口解决，配合 FakeTimeProvider 控制测试时间
summary_angle: 一个改动（DateTime.Now → TimeProvider.GetUtcNow()）让订阅过期、试用结束、午夜窗口这三类场景全部可测试

information_blocks.source_anchor: DateTime.Now is scattered everywhere: services, validators, business rules, even domain entities. It looks innocent. But it quietly breaks your tests.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：一个代码面板里 DateTime.Now 高亮显示，旁边出现红叉，代表不可测试

information_blocks.source_anchor: The fix is simple: inject time as a dependency. Register it once in DI: builder.Services.AddSingleton(TimeProvider.System);
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间：一个橙色箭头指向右侧，表示重构方向

information_blocks.source_anchor: FakeTimeProvider for testing... var time = new FakeTimeProvider(); time.SetUtcNow(...) // Now you can simulate ANY moment in time
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：一个代码面板里 _timeProvider.GetUtcNow() 高亮显示，绿色对勾，可测试标签

main_metaphor: 代码中——时间从全局隐患变成可控的依赖
primary_subject: 两个代码面板的左右对比：DateTime.Now（红叉）vs TimeProvider 注入（绿色对勾）
subject_action: 代码面板展示改造前后的对比，橙色箭头指向改造方向
